is_it_real_leather.text: Yes — full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. The real thing.

how_does_it_ship.text: Ships free in the US, and eight bucks international. Most orders land in three to five days.

return_policy.text: Thirty-day returns, no questions asked. Just message us.

warranty.text: Two-year craftsmanship warranty — if the stitching or hardware fails, we replace it.

sizing.text: Four-point-three inches wide, three-point-one tall, point-three thick. Fits a pocket without bulging.

color.text: Three colors right now — black, caramel, and deep oxblood. Caramel is the fan favorite.

price.text: It's forty-nine dollars, and that includes shipping if you're in the States.

card_capacity.text: Holds six cards comfortably, eight if you pack it. Plus a cash sleeve in the middle.

water_resistance.text: Naturally water-resistant — vegetable-tanned leather beads up rain. Don't swim with it, but you'll be fine in a storm.

rfid.text: Full RFID blocking on every card slot. Contactless skimmers get nothing.

price.text: A hundred forty-nine dollars. Ships free in the US.

material.text: Cordura 1000D ballistic nylon. Water-resistant and basically indestructible.

capacity.text: Eighteen liters. Fits a 16-inch laptop, a change of clothes, and a water bottle.

sizing.text: Seventeen inches tall, eleven wide, six deep. Carry-on legal on every major airline.

weight.text: Two-point-one pounds empty. Feels like nothing on your back.

warranty.text: Lifetime warranty. Anything breaks, we replace it.

color.text: Two right now — matte black and desert tan. More next season.

shipping.text: Free US shipping, twelve bucks international, three to five days.
